{{Quote|Tell everyone I said hi. And kill some of those stupid Rogak clanners!|Ortugg|<ref name="Letter" />}}
The '''Rogak clan''' was a clan of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]]. They were the rivals of [[Ortugg]]'s clan. When Ortugg wrote a letter home to [[Venorra]], he signed off the message by asking her to kill some Rogak clanners.<ref name="Letter" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Ortugg's Letter Home|book=The Star Wars Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
